figures.caption: Fig. 1: MRI scans of various brain tumors with tumor binary mask. This figure shows MRI images of the 3 brain tumor types studied, with their tumor binary mask localizing the tumor region.
Fig. 2: Bar chat showing brain MRI image distribution across tumor classes
Fig. 3: Pipeline of the proposed multimodal framework to CNN explainability. Stage 3 is adapted from [11].
Fig. 8: Saliency attribution of brain MRI images for each tumor type with GradCAM, Grad-CAM++, and ScoreCAM.
Fig. 9: Comparing segmentation evaluation of the different saliency methods with DSC score and IoU.
Fig. 6: The evaluation metrics for each model are compared to assess their accuracy and robustness in brain tumor classification.
Fig. 7: Confusion matrix for the top-performing model, InceptionResNetV2
Fig. 11: The performance metric for brain tumor classification across different LLMs.
Fig. 10: Heatmap segmentation for Meningioma, Pituitary tumor, and Glioma, respectively.
